metrics.name: mutation-config
metrics.note: optional per the task — absence is not penalized

metrics.name: create-card-id
metrics.target: create response returns the new id

metrics.name: create-tx-id
metrics.target: create response returns the new id

metrics.name: schemathesis
metrics.target: API conforms to its OpenAPI contract (Schemathesis)
metrics.note: schemathesis could not load/collect the OpenAPI schema — not scored

categories.name: Architecture & Design
notes: PROXY: layering needs layer rules (oracle) and the overengineering verdict needs human review. NDepend/SonarQube can deepen this.

metrics.name: dependency-direction
metrics.target: domain does not reference infrastructure (Roslyn usings)

metrics.name: overengineering-proxy
metrics.note: 4/4 single-implementation interfaces — normal DIP ports (repository/UoW/publisher); flagged for human review, not scored

categories.name: REST API Design
notes: No static OpenAPI file found (spec is likely generated at runtime); run --deep to generate and lint it.

metrics.name: openapi-populated
metrics.note: the OpenAPI document is served but declares no endpoints — an empty contract

categories.name: Persistence & Database
notes: PROXY: 3NF / justified denormalization need functional-dependency analysis (human review). N+1, seq scans and EXPLAIN need a live DB (--deep + container, e.g. via pg_stat_statements/HypoPG).

categories.name: Messaging
notes: Deep messaging checks (publish-duplicate -> single effect; kill consumer mid-process; Schema Registry compatibility) require a Kafka container and the app running.

metrics.name: kafka-event-live
metrics.target: transaction event published, keyed by id

categories.name: Security
notes: PROXY: SAST/DAST findings need false-positive triage and the BOLA test needs an oracle scenario (user A vs resource of B). Final verdict = human review.

metrics.name: pci-pan
metrics.target: no PAN (Luhn-valid card) embedded in code/config

metrics.name: authz
metrics.note: out of scope — absence is not a finding

categories.name: Resilience & Error Handling
notes: Real fault injection (Toxiproxy) and recovery measurement need --deep + a running container.

metrics.name: no-stacktrace-leak
metrics.target: errors don't leak stack traces / internals

metrics.name: mutation-tool
metrics.note: optional per the task — absence is not penalized

metrics.name: pinning
metrics.target: pinned dependencies (lock file / global.json / Central Package Management)

categories.name: Documentation
notes: PROXY: section/link presence is automatic, but the QUALITY of the prose needs human review.

runs.patchReason: Dockerfile COPY referenced CreditCardApi.sln but the project ships CreditCardApi.slnx; minimal build-blocker fix (build config only, no source/logic change). Model's own defect, so the penalty applies.
